highlights.description: KernelSHAP explainer - model-agnostic SHAP values using weighted linear regression
ExactSHAP explainer - brute-force exact Shapley values for small feature sets
Markdown report generation example for documentation and compliance
Upgraded to gocharts v2.27.0 with ChartIR refactoring

added.description: KernelSHAP explainer (`explainer/kernel`) with SHAP kernel weights
ExactSHAP explainer (`explainer/exact`) with O(n*2^n) brute-force algorithm

changed.description: Refactor render package to use `gocharts/v2/charts/chartir` for ChartIR types

fixed.description: Add nolint:gosec directives for deterministic test seeds

documentation.description: KernelSHAP explainer guide and overview documentation
ExactSHAP explainer guide with complexity analysis

ExactSHAP comparison tests with mathematically verified Shapley values

infrastructure.description: Add KernelSHAP tests to CI workflow

highlights.description: TreeSHAP for XGBoost/LightGBM - exact SHAP values 40-100x faster than permutation methods
LinearSHAP for linear models - O(d) closed-form SHAP computation
Comprehensive MkDocs documentation site with guides and API reference

breaking.description: `Masker.Mask()` now returns `([]float64, error)` instead of panicking on dimension mismatches

upgradeGuide.description: Add error handling to all `Mask()` and `MaskWithBackground()` calls

added.description: TreeSHAP explainer (`explainer/tree`) with O(TLD²) algorithm for tree ensembles

changed.description: Masker interface returns errors instead of panicking

documentation.description: MkDocs documentation site with explainer guides, API reference, and model integration docs
Release notes for v0.1.0 and v0.2.0
